channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: NVIDIA/TileGym
item.description: Helpful kernel tutorials and examples for tile-based GPU programming

item.title: Alibaba-Quark/LiveAvatar
item.description: Implementation of "Live Avatar: Streaming Real-time Audio-Driven Avatar Generation with Infinite Length"

item.title: crowmd/GoogleMapAIagent
item.description: (no description)

item.title: lachlan2k/React2Shell-CVE-2025-55182-original-poc
item.description: Original Proof-of-Concept's for React2Shell CVE-2025-55182

item.title: guhcostan/mac-cleaner-cli
item.description: (no description)

item.title: YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-nano-banana-pro-prompts
item.description: 🍌 500+ selected Nano Banana Pro prompts with images, multilingual support, and instant gallery preview. Open-source prompt engineering library

item.title: mrknow001/RSC_Detector
item.description: Supports RSC fingerprinting and exploitation of the React component vulnerability CVE-2025-55182.

item.title: NVIDIA/cutile-python
item.description: cuTile is a programming model for writing parallel kernels for NVIDIA GPUs

item.title: matzehuels/stacktower
item.description: CLI tool that renders package dependencies as physical tower structures. Supports PyPI, npm, and crates.io with optimal crossing minimization.

item.title: assetnote/react2shell-scanner
item.description: High Fidelity Detection Mechanism for RSC/Next.js RCE (CVE-2025-55182 & CVE-2025-66478)

item.title: TanStack/ai
item.description: 🤖 SDK that enhances your applications with AI capabilities

item.title: msanft/CVE-2025-55182
item.description: Explanation and full RCE PoC for CVE-2025-55182

item.title: pshenok/server-survival
item.description: Tower defense game that teaches cloud architecture. Build infrastructure, survive traffic, learn scaling.

item.title: ryanssenn/torchless
item.description: High-speed LLM inference in C/C++

item.title: norish-recipes/norish
item.description: Norish - A realtime, self-hosted recipe app for families & friends

item.title: antonmedv/gitmal
item.description: A static page generator for repos

item.title: MemoriLabs/Memori
item.description: Open-Source Memory Engine for LLMs, AI Agents & Multi-Agent Systems

item.title: microsoft/fara
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Facepunch/sbox-public
item.description: s&box is a modern game engine, built on Valve's Source 2 and the latest .NET technology, it provides a modern intuitive editor for creating games

item.title: nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill
item.description: An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms

item.title: basecamp/fizzy
item.description: (no description)

item.title: EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin
item.description: Official Claude Code compound engineering plugin

item.title: LeslieLeung/glean
item.description: A self-hosted RSS reader and personal knowledge management tool.

item.title: coder/ghostty-web
item.description: Ghostty for the web with xterm.js API compatibility

item.title: langwatch/better-agents
item.description: Standards for building agents, better

item.title: amazon-far/holosoma
item.description: (no description)

item.title: vllm-project/vllm-omni
item.description: A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models

item.title: TelegramMessenger/cocoon
item.description: cocoon

item.title: stepfun-ai/gelab-zero
item.description: GELab: GUI Exploration Lab. One of the best GUI agent solutions in the galaxy, built by the StepFun-GELab team and powered by Step’s research capabilities.

item.title: pguso/rag-from-scratch
item.description: Demystify RAG by building it from scratch. Local LLMs, no black boxes - real understanding of embeddings, vector search, retrieval, and context-augmented generation.

item.title: gavrielc/Nano-PDF
item.description: Edit PDF files with Nano Banana

item.title: Gururagavendra/gmail-cleaner
item.description: web based GUI to cleanup gmail delete, mark as read, unsubsribe from uncessary things u dont like

item.title: coleam00/remote-agentic-coding-system
item.description: Remote Coding Agent for the Dynamous Agentic Coding Course and special Black Friday livestream. Connect Claude Code or Codex to Slack, Telegram, GitHub, etc.
